violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety (with RIDOH Center for Food Protection) at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. CFSM application left with person in charge. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

Meatballs were observed held at 108-129 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was reheated to above 165 degrees Fahrenheit at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026
The establishment does not have an allergen statement present for consumer awareness on the menu. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024
